metadata.description: An eclectic mix of skills, agents and commands for Claude Code and CoWork

plugins.name: lyrics-analyzer
plugins.description: Analyse song lyrics for themes and literary craft, or extract an abstract style recipe to guide songwriting.

plugins.name: lyrics-creator
plugins.description: Write original song lyrics with anti-AI-cliché constraints, review them with structured critique, and iterate through a create-review-revise cycle.

plugins.name: watercolor-guide
plugins.description: Analyse any image and receive a watercolor painting guide in four sections — Overview, Composition, Palette & Colour, and Step-by-Step — so you can jump directly to the section you need while working.

plugins.name: acrylic-guide
plugins.description: Analyse any image and receive an acrylic painting guide in four sections — Overview, Composition, Palette & Colour, and Step-by-Step — so you can jump directly to the section you need while working.

plugins.name: terrain-painting-guide
plugins.description: Analyse a photo or description of a tabletop terrain piece and receive a painting guide in four sections — Overview, Colour Plan, Palette & Colours, and Step-by-Step — covering priming, base coating, washing, drybrushing, detailing, and basing.

plugins.name: suno-prompt-creator
plugins.description: Turn song lyrics into Suno AI music prompts — formatted lyric block with meta tags, crafted style prompt, and recommended advanced parameters.
